channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: As Cal finishes spring football, coach says he’s ‘very confident’ about team’s direction
item.description: Cal coach Justin Wilcox says he feels 'really good about where the team can be' after 16 spring practices.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Faraudo, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump sits cageside at Miami UFC event in his latest appearance at a sports event
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — President Donald Trump said the standing ovation and cheers he drew when he took his seat at a UFC event in his home state of Florida were signs “we're doing a good job.
item.dc:creator: STEPHANY MATAT and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Western Michigan wins its 1st Frozen Four hockey title, beating Boston University 6-2
item.description: Owen Michaels scored two third-period goals to seal Western Michigan’s first Frozen Four championship in a 6-2 victory over Boston University on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: John Wawrow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Baldwin's pinch-hit single in 9th lifts White Sox over Red Sox 3-2
item.description: Pinch-hitter Brooks Baldwin lined an RBI single off Boston closer Aroldis Chapman with one out in the bottom of the ninth, lifting the Chicago White Sox to a 3-2 win over the Red Sox on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Piastri on pole and Norris only sixth in qualifying for F1's Bahrain Grand Prix
item.description: Oscar Piastri took pole in qualifying for the Bahrain Grand Prix on Saturday as his McLaren teammate and Formula 1 standings leader Lando Norris could only manage sixth. George Russell was a surprisingly strong challenger and placed second for Mercedes, .168 of a second off Piastri's time.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Masters marker creates a buzz on social media from golf fans wishing they could take his place
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Michael McDermott became the envy of the golf world — again. For the second time in three years, McDermott served as a non-competing marker at the Masters, this time playing alongside Tim Kim for 18 holes in the third round at Augusta National on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Antonio's Stephon Castle is the rookie of the year favorite, and that has him thinking ahead
item.description: San Antonio guard Stephon Castle went through a little of everything in Year 1 of his NBA career. He's been in and out of the Spurs' starting lineup. He had Gregg Popovich coaching him for only five games. He played most of the season's second half without Victor Wembanyama. It was a roller coaster.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mystery remains over cause of death of former NFL cornerback Vontae Davis
item.description: The cause of death for former NFL star cornerback Vontae Davis is still undetermined more than a year after he died at a Florida home.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: It's "Moving Day" at the 89th Masters Tournament at Augusta National Golf Club. The term refers to golfers who made the cut trying to get themselves into position on the leader board to win on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox face the Red Sox with 1-0 series lead
item.description: Boston Red Sox (7-8, third in the AL East) vs. Chicago White Sox (3-10, fifth in the AL Central) Chicago; Saturday, 4:10 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cardinals reserve C Yohel Pozo making the most of his first trip back to the majors since 2021
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — Reserve catcher Yohel Pozo will remember his first time being in St. Louis. Pozo came off the bench in the second inning against the Philadelphia Phillies on Friday night after teammate Masyn Winn left after one inning with lower back spasms, sliding into the shortstop's No.
item.dc:creator: WARREN MAYES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fruita and Palisade show off defensive skill in 2-1 Wildcats win
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — We had an absolute showdown between two worthy Southwestern League foes at Suplizio Field Friday. Fruita pitchers Gavin Cardoza (1.62 ERA Friday) and Noah Brackett (0 ERA Friday) shut down Palisade's offense after a first-inning run.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Top prospect Abdul Carter posts picture of Giants great Lawrence Taylor as NFL Draft looms
item.description: Standout pass rusher Abdul Carter had 23 career sacks at Penn State, and he could become the No. 1 pick in the NFL Draft later this month.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blackhawks score 4 3rd-period goals for 5-2 win over Bruins
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Nick Foligno scored a pair of goals, Arvid Soderblom made 31 saves and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Boston Bruins 5-2 on Thursday night. Ryan Donato, Tyler Bertuzzi and Kevin Korchinski also had goals for the Blackhawks, who scored four goals in third period to pull away.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah falls in shootout in home finale, 4-3
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In the final game at the Delta Center in their inaugural season, the Utah Hockey Club lost a thriller in a shootout to the Nashville Predators Thursday night, 4-3.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz end 9-game skid with overtime win over Blazers
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In what has been an insufferable season for Utah Jazz fans, the team gave them a treat Wednesday night -- a thrilling overtime victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Babe Ruth's former Florida home goes up for sale for nearly $2M
item.description: A Florida home with historical ties, including to baseball legend Babe Ruth, hit the market for just under $2 million.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WGN 9

item.title: Keyonte George scores career-high 35 in Jazz loss
item.description: ATLANTA (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George set a new career high with 35 points, but it wasn't enough to stop the Utah Jazz' nine-game losing streak in a 147-135 loss to the Atlanta Hawks Sunday. The Jazz have lost 19 of 20 overall. Utah has given up at least 140 points in three straight games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: UConn dominates South Carolina in women's national championship
item.description: A huge win for the UConn Huskies Sunday as the team dominated the South Carolina Gamecocks and made history inside Amalie Arena.
item.dc:creator: Marilyn Parker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: Dawn Staley and South Carolina hope to finish off a second straight season with an NCAA championship, which would give the Gamecocks a third title in four years. To do so, they'll need to beat Paige Bueckers and UConn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
